title: Sasken Technologies Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Sasken Technologies Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Sasken Technologies Holdings Services in Jabalpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Sasken Technologies Holdings Services:
Sasken Technologies Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sasken Technologies Holdings Services!
